creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
For now, should I assume that these crashes at startup have the same underlying cause?

ibus-extension-gtk3 and ibus-ui-gtk3.

----

root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # grep -e ibus-extension-gtk3 -e ibus-ui-gtk3 /var/log/messages
Sep 11 15:36:27 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 3133 (ibus-extension-gtk3), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 5 (core dumped)
Sep 11 15:36:27 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 3132 (ibus-ui-gtk3), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 5 (core dumped)
Sep 11 18:28:40 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 3153 (ibus-extension-gtk3), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 5 (core dumped)
Sep 11 18:28:41 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 3152 (ibus-ui-gtk3), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 5 (core dumped)
Sep 13 19:18:51 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 29011 (ibus-extension-gtk3), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 5 (core dumped)
Sep 13 19:18:51 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 29010 (ibus-ui-gtk3), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 5 (core dumped)
Sep 13 20:07:11 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 3162 (ibus-extension-gtk3), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 5 (core dumped)
Sep 13 20:07:11 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 3160 (ibus-ui-gtk3), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 5 (core dumped)
Sep 15 09:26:57 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 3697 (ibus-extension-gtk3), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 5 (core dumped)
Sep 15 09:27:00 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 3696 (ibus-ui-gtk3), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 5 (core dumped)
Sep 16 00:42:08 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 3144 (ibus-extension-gtk3), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 5 (core dumped)
Sep 16 00:42:09 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd kernel: pid 3142 (ibus-ui-gtk3), jid 0, uid 1002: exited on signal 5 (core dumped)
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # uptime
 7:05AM  up  6:25, 6 users, load averages: 3.06, 4.69, 4.23
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # cd ~
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # ls -hl *.core
ls: No match.
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # exit
logout

grahamperrin

-rw-------  1 grahamperrin  grahamperrin    40M 16 Sep 00:42 ibus-ui-gtk3.core
